Subject: Coming to NY

Hi, Lesley,

I'm coming to NYC tomorrow (Saturday) late afternoon.  I have an
appointment with Mort Zuckerman for breakfast  on Sunday Morning.

I'll arrive at 5:45pm tomorrow on Amtrak.  If JE is available any time
Saturday evening, this would be a good time to talk about the
"curriculum".  (I'll be coming with Oliver Steele, who is helping with
that project.)

Best, Marvin
